title: Bare Bones X Enchanting Infuser
description: Add Bare Bones support for the mod Enchanting Infuser.
body:
ABOUT:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Adds Barebones support for the mod [Enchanting Infuser](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-infuser). _Enjoy_!
